productValidatorSemantics.minimumAcceptance: at least one accepted core field: headline, whatHappened, whyItMatters, or expectedBehavior
productValidatorSemantics.unsafePrecedence: any unsafe field failure rejects the whole card even when earlier fields are field-local failures or accepted

coveredBehaviors: safe core copy renders while unsupported optional fields are omitted
optional generated-evidence claim still fails closed at card level
safe paraphrase with limited new connective wording passes
unknown fact IDs remain card-level source-of-truth failures even when core copy is safe
invented expected behavior is omitted when safe core copy remains
expected behavior alone still needs expected-behavior support
reader-facing words such as problem, signal, issue are not rejected by themselves
